evals.expected_output: Creates full account folder structure with template files, business context from web research
expectations: Directory created at /{config.company_folder}/Accounts/Globex/
meetings/ and contacts/ subdirectories created

Main account file Globex.md created with all sections: Deal Ledger, Open Tasks, Stakeholders, Meetings, Business Context, MEDDPICC, Command of the Message, TECHMAPS, Tech Stack, Architecture Diagram, Salesforce Updates
Frontmatter includes ae, se, csm, deal_type (Net New), salesforce_account, salesforce_opportunity, gong_url
Ledger.md created
meetings.base created with correct dataview config
contacts.base created with correct dataview config
Business Context populated with web research: About the Company and Recent News
Recent News items have direct article URLs (not profile pages)
No blank line between heading and first bullet

evals.expected_output: Creates Meta account with well-known company context
expectations: Account folder structure created for Meta
About the Company section describes Meta accurately
Recent News includes items with verified article URLs only

evals.expected_output: Creates account with Gong and Salesforce URLs, triggers automatic imports and summarization
expectations: Gong activity URL detected and saved to gong_url frontmatter field
Salesforce Account URL detected (contains /Account/) and saved to salesforce_account frontmatter field
Account folder structure created with all template files
Business context populated from web research
/sales-salesforce scan Initech invoked to discover all opportunities
/sales-gong Initech {gong_url} invoked for bulk historical import (if Playwright configured)
/sales-summarize-account Initech invoked after imports complete
Summarization skipped if no meeting files exist or no Gong import was performed
Report includes Salesforce import status, Gong import status, and summarization status

evals.expected_output: Creates account with Salesforce Opportunity URL, looks up parent account, discovers all opportunities
expectations: Salesforce Opportunity URL detected (contains /Opportunity/) and saved to salesforce_opportunity frontmatter field
Opportunity ID extracted and parent Account ID looked up via REST API
salesforce_account field populated with constructed Account URL
/sales-salesforce scan Contoso invoked to discover all opportunities
No Gong import triggered (no gong_url provided)
Summarization skipped (no Gong import means no transcripts)
